title: API one-shot query implementation/handling
body: containers_stats.go was missing the handling of the one-shot query parameter. Modified the code to handle the incoming query as well as return an error if there is a mismatch of stream and one-shot (stream must be false if one shot is true). One shot skips the preCPU stats and returns a singular cycle's statistics. Also added documentation in register_containers.go

comments.body: should rebase to one commit and `git commit -s`
